rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use assign statements in implementation annexes for output bindings
Ensure all guarantees have valid types and expressions
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use assign statements in implementation annexes for output bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output range guarantees
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level output bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; instead, trace and fix the root cause
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
